title: Diamond Block Compressor
description: This mod can compress a lot of diamond blocks.
body:
This mod can compress a lot of diamond blocks.  

You can make 9x compressed diamond block with 9 diamond blocks.  

You can upgrade to 81x with the 9 9x compressed diamond blocks.  

You can compress diamond until reach 3,000,000,000x compressed diamond block.  

This mod is created by MCreator and it is not open source.  

The mod has stopped to update since May 12, 2022.
